---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%",
  dpi = 300
)
```

# nycmaps <img src="man/figures/nycmaps.png" align="right" width="360">

<!-- badges: start -->
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/kjhealy/nycmaps/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/kjhealy/nycmaps/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
<!-- badges: end -->

Provides sf objects of various New York City geographies (and associated tibbles of identifiers) for drawing thematic maps.

## Installation

You can install the development version of nycmaps with:

``` r
remotes::install_github("kjhealy/nycmaps")
```

## Load

```{r load}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(nycmaps)
```

# What's included

## Borough Boundaries

```{r nyc-boros}
nyc_boros

nyc_boros_sf
```


```{r nyc-boros-map}
ggplot(nyc_boros_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Zip Codes (ZCTAs)

```{r nyc-zips}
nyc_zips

nyc_zip_sf
```

Notice that we have more zip codes in `nyc_zips` than zctas in `nyc_zip_sf`. Several of these zip codes are for PO Boxes or otherwise non-residential (like LGA and Fort Totten Park).

```{r nyc-zips-empty}
nyc_zip_sf |>
  filter(pop == 0)
```

```{r nyc-zips-map}
ggplot(nyc_zip_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Neighborhood Tabulation Areas

### NTA 2010

```{r nyc-nta10}
nyc_nta10_sf
```

```{r nyc-nta10-map}
ggplot(nyc_nta10_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

### NTA 2020

```{r nyc-nta20}
nyc_nta20_sf
```

```{r nyc-nta20-map}
ggplot(nyc_nta20_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Community District Tabulation Areas (CDTAs) 2020

```{r nyc-cdtas-2020}
nyc_cdtas_2020_sf
```

```{r nyc-cdtas-2020-map}
ggplot(nyc_cdtas_2020_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Police Precincts

```{r nyc-police-precincts}
nyc_police_precincts_sf
```

```{r nyc-police-precincts-map}
ggplot(nyc_police_precincts_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## City Council Districts

```{r nyc-city-council}
nyc_city_council_districts_sf
```

```{r nyc-city-council-map}
ggplot(nyc_city_council_districts_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Congressional Districts

```{r nyc-congressional}
nyc_congressional_districts_sf
```

```{r nyc-congressional-map}
ggplot(nyc_congressional_districts_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Election Precincts

```{r nyc-election-precincts}
nyc_election_precincts_sf
```

```{r nyc-election-precincts-map}
ggplot(nyc_election_precincts_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## School Districts

```{r nyc-school-districts}
nyc_school_districts_sf
```

```{r nyc-school-districts-map}
ggplot(nyc_school_districts_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## State Assembly Districts

```{r nyc-state-assembly}
nyc_state_assembly_districts_sf
```

```{r nyc-state-assembly-map}
ggplot(nyc_state_assembly_districts_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## State Senate Districts

```{r nyc-state-senate}
nyc_state_senate_districts_sf
```

```{r nyc-state-senate-map}
ggplot(nyc_state_senate_districts_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Municipal Court Districts

```{r nyc-municipal-court}
nyc_municipal_court_districts_sf
```

```{r nyc-municipal-court-map}
ggplot(nyc_municipal_court_districts_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Public Use Microdata Areas (PUMAs)

### PUMAs 2010

```{r nyc-pumas-2010}
nyc_pumas_2010_sf
```

```{r nyc-pumas-2010-map}
ggplot(nyc_pumas_2010_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

### PUMAs 2020

```{r nyc-pumas-2020}
nyc_pumas_2020_sf
```

```{r nyc-pumas-2020-map}
ggplot(nyc_pumas_2020_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Fire Companies

```{r nyc-fire-companies}
nyc_fire_companies_sf
```

```{r nyc-fire-companies-map}
ggplot(nyc_fire_companies_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Census Tracts

### Census Tracts 2000

```{r nyc-census-tracts-2000}
nyc_census_tracts_2000_sf
```

```{r nyc-census-tracts-2000-map}
ggplot(nyc_census_tracts_2000_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

### Census Tracts 2010

```{r nyc-census-tracts-2010}
nyc_census_tracts_2010_sf
```

```{r nyc-census-tracts-2010-map}
ggplot(nyc_census_tracts_2010_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

### Census Tracts 2020

```{r nyc-census-tracts-2020}
nyc_census_tracts_2020_sf
```

```{r nyc-census-tracts-2020-map}
ggplot(nyc_census_tracts_2020_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Census Blocks

### Census Blocks 2000

```{r nyc-census-blocks-2000}
nyc_census_blocks_2000_sf
```

```{r nyc-census-blocks-2000-map}
ggplot(nyc_census_blocks_2000_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

### Census Blocks 2010

```{r nyc-census-blocks-2010}
nyc_census_blocks_2010_sf
```

```{r nyc-census-blocks-2010-map}
ggplot(nyc_census_blocks_2010_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

### Census Blocks 2020

```{r nyc-census-blocks-2020}
nyc_census_blocks_2020_sf
```

```{r nyc-census-blocks-2020-map}
ggplot(nyc_census_blocks_2020_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Atomic Polygons

```{r nyc-atomic-polygons}
nyc_atomic_polygons_sf
```

```{r nyc-atomic-polygons-map}
ggplot(nyc_atomic_polygons_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```

## Census Tract Population Proportions 2010-2020

```{r nyc-ct-pop-proportion}
nyc_ct_pop_proportion_2010_2020_df
```

## Census Block Relationships 2020

```{r nyc-census-block-relationships}
nyc_census_block_relationships_2020_df
```

## Census Tract to City Council District Relationships 2023

```{r nyc-ct-ccd-relationships}
nyc_ct_ccd_relationships_2023_df
```

## Census Tract Relationships 2020

```{r nyc-census-tract-relationships}
nyc_census_tract_relationships_2020_df
```

## Shoreline with Adjacent Areas

```{r nyc-shoclip}
nyc_shoclip_sf
```

```{r nyc-shoclip-map}
ggplot(nyc_shoclip_sf) +
  geom_sf() +
  theme_void()
```
